comment: Clean Code was surprisingly easy to get through. Robert C. Martin kept it clear and the main points landed well.
I liked how Clean Code stayed practical. It gave enough detail without dragging the whole thing out.
Clean Code had a few slow sections, but the stronger parts made it worth finishing in the end.
This one felt well paced. Robert C. Martin explained the ideas in a way that actually stuck.
Clean Code was solid overall. I would still recommend it to someone looking for a useful read.
